headline: MaxLinear shares are trading higher after Loop Capital upgraded its rating on the stock from Hold to Buy and raised its price target from $17 to $75.
summary: MaxLinear shares are trading higher after Loop Capital upgraded its rating on the stock from Hold to Buy and raised its price target from $17 to $75.
